OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Juilo Bonilla, is present.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Sean Dower, is present.
Attorney, Kathryn H. Edwards, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-07-2009 is vacated.
